title: Vanilla+ structures
description: This datapack adds 7 new vanilla like structures.
body:
My datapack adds 7 new structures with loot! These structures are: lighthouse, ancient_temple, witch hut, villager camp, wooden cabin, farmer family, brick pyramid.

This is lighthouse one of 7 new structures
![lighthouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fec6bb9f9ba1a07def56b0679ca3004dc0165c3.png)
